category_sources: source_facts.description says tool for extracting closed captions from video files; official GitHub README describes CCExtractor as producing subtitles for TV recordings and extracting closed captions.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub README use CCExtractor; source_facts.name is ccextractor.
docs_sources: Official CCExtractor docs homepage lists user and technical documentation; official command-line usage page documents CLI use; official GitHub README links usage information on the website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/CCExtractor/ccextractor, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies closed-caption extraction; official GitHub README lists extracting subtitles, closed captions from DVDs, and converting captions to subtitles.
